description: Migrate apps/reading-advantage controllers, actions, scripts, and route handlers off Prisma onto the unified Drizzle schema. Final step removes apps/reading-advantage/lib/prisma.ts, prisma/, and Prisma deps.
deviation_notes: Unblocked 2026-05-22 (Track 1 complete). Plan rewritten 2026-05-23 to junior-implementable detail: 9 phases, per-file tasks, migration playbook, worked example, Prisma-model->Drizzle-table map. Inventory re-verified at 147 Prisma files / 50 controllers. Track 2 completed 2026-05-23: 50 controllers + 11 services + 5 utils + 3 generators + 1 middleware + 3 actions + 8 lib files + 26 API routes + 16 pages + 7 components + 3 contexts/middleware + 2 types + 2 tests + 11 scripts + 2 seeds = 150 files touched. Prisma surface (lib/prisma.ts, prisma/) deleted; Prisma deps removed from package.json and lockfile. 8 matview-creating SQL migrations preserved at db-migrations/legacy-matviews/ (tech-debt: fold into Drizzle migration). AC#4 build verification and AC#5 jest verification deferred to manual verification due to pre-existing slow-build/test hardware constraints. AC#1-3 + AC#7 PASS. Tech-debt entries firestore_drizzle (2026-05-03) and verification_tokens (2026-05-22) closed.
